name: nocturne_memory
desc: A lightweight, rollbackable, and visual Long-Term Memory Server for MCP Agents. Say goodbye to Vector RAG and amnesia. Empower your AI with persistent, graph-l…
descFull: A lightweight, rollbackable, and visual Long-Term Memory Server for MCP Agents. Say goodbye to Vector RAG and amnesia. Empower your AI with persistent, graph-like structured memory across any model, session, or tool. Drop-in replacement for OpenClaw.
